data.title: Costain Updates Share Capital and Voting Rights for Disclosure Calculations
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An announcement from Costain ( (GB:COST) ) is now available.

Costain Group PLC has confirmed that as of 31 March 2026 its issued share capital consists of 266,342,017 ordinary shares of 1 pence each, with every share carrying one voting right and no shares held in treasury. This updated share capital figure serves as the new denominator for investors when calculating whether they must disclose holdings or changes in their positions under the FCA’s transparency rules, ensuring continued compliance and clarity for the market.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:COST) stock is a Hold with a £180.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Costain stock, see the GB:COST Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on COST Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, COST is a Outperform.

The score is driven primarily by improved financial stability and earnings quality (higher margins, low leverage, solid cash conversion), supported by strong technical uptrend signals. Valuation is reasonable but not deeply compelling, and the key risk tempering the score is the multi-year revenue contraction, which could limit future growth if it persists.

To see Spark’s full report on COST stock, click here.

More about Costain

Costain Group PLC is a UK-based engineering and construction company focused on delivering infrastructure solutions. The group typically serves transport, energy, water and defence markets, providing complex project management and engineering services for public and private sector clients.

Average Trading Volume: 1,523,033

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: £482.9M

data.title: Neodecortech’s 2025 Sustainability Drive Cuts Emissions and Delivers €7 Million in Savings
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Neodecortech SpA ( (IT:NDT) ) has provided an announcement.

Neodecortech has released its 2025 Sustainability Report, detailing progress on ESG integration and operational efficiency across its value chain. The company generated €189 million in direct economic value, confirmed carbon neutrality for Scope 1 and 2 with 100% renewable energy, and cut CO₂ emissions per unit by 3.5% and water intensity by 16.8% through biomass, photovoltaics, and increased water reuse.

The group expanded circular economy initiatives by using more recycled and certified materials, recovering production waste, and launching EU-backed industrial symbiosis projects like PUSH2HEAT, which converts residual heat into reusable energy and delivers estimated annual savings of €180,000. Overall, 2025 efficiency projects produced about €7 million in measurable benefits, while Neodecortech reinforced its social and governance profile via permanent contracts for 97% of staff, a 24.2% rise in training hours, ESG-focused e-learning, and a board with 43% female representation, underscoring sustainability as a driver of long-term competitiveness.

CEO Luigi Cologni emphasized that sustainability functions as an industrial lever rather than a cost, with energy self-production and material recovery structurally lowering expenses. Looking ahead, the company is studying additional waste recovery and biomass projects for 2026 to further entrench an efficient, circular, and long-term-oriented industrial model.

The most recent analyst rating on (IT:NDT) stock is a Hold with a EUR4.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Neodecortech SpA stock, see the IT:NDT Stock Forecast page.

More about Neodecortech SpA

Neodecortech S.p.A. is a leading European producer of decorative surfaces for faced panels and flooring used in the interior design sector, listed on Euronext STAR Milan. The group focuses on integrating circular economy principles and renewable energy into its industrial processes, aiming to enhance efficiency, reduce environmental impact, and strengthen its competitive position in the interiors supply chain.

Average Trading Volume: 16,152

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: €48.29M

See more data about NDT stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Butn cancels 1.2 million shares under minimum holding buy-back
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Butn Limited ( (AU:BTN) ) just unveiled an update.

Butn Limited has announced the cessation of 1,185,630 ordinary fully paid shares on 1 April 2026. The cancellation of these securities was carried out under a minimum holding buy-back, which is typically used to streamline the share register by removing small or uneconomic holdings.

The buy-back driven cancellation reduces the company’s number of shares on issue and may marginally improve capital structure efficiency for remaining investors. It also signals an administrative tidying of the share register rather than a broader capital return or strategic shift, with limited immediate operational impact indicated in the filing.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:BTN) stock is a Hold with a A$0.04 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Butn Limited stock, see the AU:BTN Stock Forecast page.

More about Butn Limited

Butn Limited, listed on the ASX under the code BTN, is an Australian public company. The business operates in the financial services sector, providing funding and capital management solutions to its clients and shareholders through listed equity securities.

Metrics Master Income Trust ( (AU:MXT) ) has provided an update.

Metrics Master Income Trust, an income‑focused investment trust that actively manages diversified corporate loan portfolios in Australia’s bank‑dominated lending market, aims to deliver monthly cash income and capital preservation for investors. The trust is managed by The Trust Company (RE Services) Limited, part of the Perpetual financial services group, which provides funds management, financial advisory and trustee services.

The trust reported an unaudited net tangible asset backing of $2.0000 per unit as at 31 March 2026, with net asset value and net tangible assets reported as equivalent for this purpose. The disclosure provides investors with an updated view of the trust’s per‑unit value in Australian dollars, reinforcing transparency around portfolio valuation but without implying any guarantee of future performance.
